basic_details.job_title: IGH Dwarka Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Hospital has officially announced the Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 with 13 vacancies. The detailed notification has been released under Advt. No. F. No.2/16(30)/Estt./Aptt./SR/2026-IGH/10486-90. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria and hold an MBBS with requisite Postgraduate qualification (MD/DNB/Diploma) registered with the Delhi Medical Council can attend the walk-in interview on 13 July 2026. The official notification PDF and complete recruitment details are provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: General: 45 years, OBC (Delhi only): 48 years, SC/ST: 50 years
age_limit.details: General: 45 years OBC (Delhi only): 48 years SC/ST: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS and requisite Postgraduate qualification (MD/DNB/Diploma) registered with Delhi Medical Council.
qualification.details: MBBS Postgraduate qualification (MD/DNB/Diploma) Registered with Delhi Medical Council.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level 11 Salary Range: Rs. 67,700/- to Rs 2,08,700/- Other allowances as admissible.

content_sections.heading: IGH Dwarka Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IGH Dwarka Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IGH Dwarka Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS Postgraduate qualification (MD/DNB/Diploma) Registered with Delhi Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: General: 45 years OBC (Delhi only): 48 years SC/ST: 50 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Pay Matrix Level 11 Salary Range: Rs. 67,700/- to Rs 2,08,700/- Other allowances as admissible.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IGH Dwarka Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Resident posts at Indira Gandhi Hospital?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to report on the specified walk-in date with all required documents. There is no separate last date for online application.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a requisite Postgraduate qualification (MD/DNB/Diploma) and must be registered with the Delhi Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for the Senior Resident post across various specializations at Indira Gandhi Hospital.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is 45 years for General candidates, 48 years for OBC (Delhi only) candidates, and 50 years for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary is based on Pay Matrix Level 11, ranging from Rs. 67,700/- to Rs 2,08,700/-, along with other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is a Walk-in Interview. Interested candidates need to appear directly at the interview venue on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry a duly filled application proforma, self-attested copies of all educational certificates, and two passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Which departments have vacancies for Senior Residents?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in Medicine, Anaesthesia, General Surgery, Orthopaedics, Ophthalmology, and Radio-diagnosis departments.
